## Reviewer checklist

- [ ] Claims match evidence.
- [ ] No hidden authority transition is introduced.
- [ ] Model output does not control execution machinery.
- [ ] Receipts or logs do not leak unnecessary raw artifacts.
- [ ] Failure behavior is fail-closed where relevant.
- [ ] Documentation avoids hype and unsupported claims.
